That’s a straight-up $350 discount on its $,1700 usual going rate. This is a fairly new laptop that hit the scene earlier this year at CES as one of the first models to debut with Qualcomm’s latest Snapdragon X2 Elite processor. Today’s offer lands as the first deal we’ve tracked for this new notebook, and it marks a new best price to beat at 20% off. Another variant of this laptop with a 2.8K OLED and an 18-core X2 Elite processor can also be had for $1,472.49 shipped with promo code EXTRAFIVE. This is also the lowest price we have tracked for this variant, and it’s down from its usual price of $1,900. Head below for more details.
